query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_players, COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as logged_in_players, SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guest_players, MIN(createdAt) as first_player, MAX(createdAt) as latest_player FROM player_profiles; SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, COUNT(*) as new_players FROM player_profiles GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY day;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2GX11Pnc2Gj5TH4.2b4c6ce847b1 --database EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_players, COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as logged_in_players, SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guest_players, MIN(createdAt) as first_player, MAX(createdAt) as latest_player FROM player_profiles; SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, COUNT(*) as new_players FROM player_profiles GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY day;
